evals.name: trigger-responsive-drawer
evals.prompt: Create a side navigation that is a temporary drawer on mobile and a rail on desktop.

assertions.text: Uses v-navigation-drawer with :temporary and :rail bound to useDisplay's mobile
Uses v-list with v-list-item for nav items

evals.name: trigger-tabs
evals.prompt: Build a settings page with tabs for profile, security, and notifications.

assertions.text: Uses v-tabs with v-tab items and v-tabs-window / v-tabs-window-item
Binds the active tab via v-model

evals.name: negative-card-dialog
evals.prompt: Make a reusable confirmation dialog for delete actions.

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger vuetify-layout; routes to vuetify-components instead
